Type: nodejs-react | Files: 189 | Languages: javascript(89), typescript(78), unknown(9), json(8), env(2)
Top-level dirs: aqua, aqua-frontend

overview.name: aqua-ai-day5-universal-upload
overview.purpose: Production frontend for the AQUA backend (`aqua/`), built with React 19, TypeScript, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand, and Radix UI.
overview.summary: aqua-ai-day5-universal-upload is a React project with 189 source files, primarily javascript, typescript, json.

importantServices.summary: AQUA Provider Errors — Shared Error Classification
AQUA Internal Intelligence Engine — Reasoning Engine
AQUA Edit Engine (Day 4) — patch-first repository editing.

potentialTechDebt: 2 very large files (>40KB) — candidates for splitting: aqua/.aqua-projects.json, aqua/.aqua-history.json
2 files exceeded the 100KB ingest cap and were truncated during indexing.
1 circular dependency chain detected — e.g. aqua/src/memory/longTermMemory.js → aqua/src/memory/memoryResolver.js → aqua/src/memory/longTermMemory.js.

architecture.frontend: Built with React, React DOM, React Router, Tailwind CSS; UI lives in component directories.
architecture.backend: Express, CORS middleware power the server side, organized around route modules.
architecture.apiLayer: 41 HTTP endpoints detected, composed via mounted routers.
architecture.dataLayer: Custom data/persistence modules present (file- or memory-backed); no database driver dependency found.
architecture.serviceRelationships: Most depended-upon modules: workspaceManager.js (8), projectIndex.js (8), longTermMemory.js (8), memorySchema.js (8).
architecture.dependencyFlow: Execution starts at aqua/server.js; dependencies flow toward core modules like aqua/src/project/workspaceManager.js.

suggestedImprovements: Break circular dependencies by extracting shared logic into a leaf module.
Split the largest files into focused modules to improve maintainability.
Triage the 1 TODO/FIXME markers — convert stale ones into tracked issues.
Add a Dockerfile for reproducible builds and deployment.
API endpoints appear unauthenticated — consider adding an auth layer.
suggestedQuestions: Explain the architecture of this project.
Walk me through the folder structure and what each part does.
Show me every API endpoint and what it does.
Trace what happens when aqua/server.js starts up.
Explain what aqua/src/project/workspaceManager.js does and what depends on it.
How is the OpenAI API integration implemented?
Which TODO items should I prioritize first?
Where should I start if I want to add a new feature?
